english: What is the upper house of the Indian Parliament called?
hindi: भारतीय संसद का उच्च सदन क्या कहा जाता है?
tamil: இந்திய நாடாளுமன்றத்தின் உயர் அவை என்ன அழைக்கப்படுகிறது?
vietnamese: Hạ viện Ấn Độ được gọi là gì?
correct_answer: The upper house of the Indian Parliament is called Rajya Sabha, which is composed of elected representatives from the states of India.
expected_failure: An AI might fail this question by hallucinating a different name for the upper house or refusing to answer due to lack of knowledge about Indian government structure.
